name: 17_Heart_Disease_Prediction_XGBoost_UCI_ML
query: Tengeneza mradi wa kutabiri ugonjwa wa moyo kwa kutumia mfano wa XGBoost na seti ya data ya UCI Heart Disease, ambayo inaweza kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/45/heart+disease). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza uteuzi wa vipengele na usanifishaji wa data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia thamani za SHAP kuelezea umuhimu wa vipengele, na hifadhi matokeo kama `results/figures/shap_importance.png`. Tekeleza mfano wa XGBoost katika `src/model.py`. Kisha, tumia thamani za SHAP kuelezea umuhimu wa vipengele, na hifadhi matokeo kama `results/shap_importance.png`. Hifadhi mduara wa ROC kwa `results/figures/roc_curve.png`. Mwishowe, tengeneza ripoti ya HTML inayoonyesha matokeo yote na vielelezo, na ihifadhi kama `results/report.html`. Hakikisha vielelezo vya SHAP vinaonyesha wazi vipengele vyenye athari kubwa zaidi. Jumuisha kulinganisha utendaji na mfano mwingine, kama vile Logistic Regression, ili kuthibitisha uimara wa mfano wa XGBoost. Hifadhi mfano wa XGBoost chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "UCI Heart Disease" inatumika, ikiwezekana kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/45/heart+disease). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usanifishaji wa data ambao unahakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Thamani za "SHAP" zinatumika kwa maelezo ya umuhimu wa vipengele, na matokeo yanahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/shap_importance.png`.
Ripoti ya HTML inayoonyesha matokeo na vielelezo inatengenezwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.html`.
Kulinganisha utendaji na mfano mwingine (mfano, Logistic Regression) kunajumuishwa ili kuthibitisha uimara wa mfano wa XGBoost.
Mfano wa XGBoost umehifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

preferences.criteria: Vielelezo vya SHAP vinapaswa kuwa wazi na kuonyesha vipengele vyenye athari kubwa zaidi, na kufanya matokeo kuwa rahisi kufasiri.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "UCI Heart Disease" inatumika, ikiwezekana kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/45/heart+disease). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` does not actually load the UCI Heart Disease dataset. The file only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` that returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and a criteria string mentioning `"UCI Heart Disease"`, but no download logic, file reading, dataset parsing, or UCI source usage is implemented. The trajectory evidence also states there is no direct evidence of downloading or loading the dataset.

<UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` only contains placeholder code. Although `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` mentions "Feature selection is implemented in src/data_loader.py", there is no actual feature-selection logic, no column filtering, no selector method, and `load_dataset()` merely returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`. `build_transforms()` also lists generic placeholders and does not implement feature selection.

judge_stats.criteria: Usanifishaji wa data ambao unahakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` does not implement actual data standardization. The file only contains a placeholder `build_transforms()` returning `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`, with no preprocessing code such as fitting/applying a scaler to dataset features, and `load_dataset()` merely returns a placeholder dictionary.

<UNSATISFIED> `src/model.py` does not implement an XGBoost model. The file only defines `KEYWORDS = ["XGBoost", "xgboost"]` and a `build_model()` function that returns `"model placeholder"`, with no `xgboost` import, no `XGBClassifier`/`XGBRegressor`, and no actual model construction logic.

judge_stats.criteria: Thamani za "SHAP" zinatumika kwa maelezo ya umuhimu wa vipengele, na matokeo yanahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/shap_importance.png`.

reason: <SATISFIED> The project includes the expected output file at `results/figures/shap_importance.png`, and the trajectory evidence states the SHAP analysis/plotting workflow ran and saved the figure to that exact path without any reported error. Although the image content could not be opened in the provided inspection, the available project evidence supports that SHAP-based feature-importance results were generated and stored as required.

<SATISFIED> The workspace tree explicitly lists `results/figures/roc_curve.png`, and the trajectory evidence states the ROC plot was saved to that exact path with no reported save/write error. The image read failure shown is from later inspection, not evidence that the file was not saved.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya HTML inayoonyesha matokeo na vielelezo inatengenezwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.html`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `results/report.html` exists in the workspace, but its recorded content is `('', None)`, which does not demonstrate an actual HTML report showing results and figures. Although `results/figures/roc_curve.png` and `results/figures/shap_importance.png` are present, there is no concrete evidence that `report.html` contains or displays them.

judge_stats.criteria: Kulinganisha utendaji na mfano mwingine (mfano, Logistic Regression) kunajumuishwa ili kuthibitisha uimara wa mfano wa XGBoost.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> The provided codebase evidence does not include any comparison implementation with another model such as Logistic Regression. `src/model.py` only contains a placeholder `build_model()` returning `"model placeholder"`, and there is no baseline/comparison code, training script, or evaluation results showing XGBoost vs another model. The trajectory note mentions such a comparison, but it is explicitly marked as non-decisive reference evidence.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa XGBoost umehifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

reason: <SATISFIED> The workspace includes the directory `models/saved_models/`, and the trajectory evidence specifically states there was an attempt to save the XGBoost model there with no reported save/export error, permission issue, path issue, or serialization failure.
